labels.value:
Please note: The option to Cashless Medical Service is not applicable to products listed below.
(VitalGuard Critical Illness, Cigna Plus, Cigna Health+ 8-IN-1 CLINICARE Plan)

Please note: The option to change beneficiary is only applicable to specific products.
(HealthFirst Elite 360, HealthFirst Elite, HealthFirst Elite-GEH, HealthFirst Core, DIY Health Plan)
